title: KI ist kein Innovationsbonus, sondern wirtschaftliche Notwendigkeit für die Energiewende
summary: Guest article by Daniel Tremer (Managing Director, control-f GmbH) for the EnBW foundation's energy debate blog, arguing that AI is an economic necessity for the energy transition rather than an optional innovation bonus.

title: Herausforderung Desinformation: Demokratie & Resilienz stärken mit Tech
summary: Daniel Tremer (Managing Director, control-f) joined the panel on strengthening democracy and resilience against disinformation with technology at Handelsblatt's GovTech summit in Berlin.
